title: dianthus quadridentatus
intro: Dianthus quadridentatus, also known as Chinese pink or fragrant pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing swelling, and treating respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, Dianthus quadridentatus is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
